subcodes.first_line: The missive from your honor, which was adorned with the mention of the Beloved, reached this awe-struck servant, and its fragrant breaths [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوب آنجناب که بطراز ذکر محبوب مزین بود باین عبد مرهوب واصل و نفحات عطریه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @high station of the true believer
